items.name: tokens
items.title: Design tokens
items.description: Semantic colors with light/dark/sepia themes, spacing, radius, motion tokens, corner smoothing, and vertical-writing utilities.

items.name: vertical-typography
items.title: Vertical Typography & Punctuation Rules
items.description: The canonical rules for setting CJK text vertically (top→bottom, RTL): glyph orientation, tate-chu-yoko digits, punctuation verticalization, and 금칙/kinsoku line breaking — per KLREQ / JLREQ / UAX #50.

items.name: vertical-button
items.title: Vertical Button
items.description: A button whose label is set on the vertical reading axis · real writing-mode, never a rotation.

items.name: toggle
items.title: Vertical Toggle
items.description: An on/off switch whose thumb travels the reading axis · up is on. role="switch" semantics.

items.name: vertical-list-cell
items.title: Vertical List Cell
items.description: The primitive behind every vertical list: a full-height column cell with leading at the top and the accessory pointing down.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Vertical Tooltip
items.description: A tooltip that opens to the left of its trigger · along the reading direction · with vertical content. Hover, focus, and Escape handling built in.

items.name: dialog
items.title: Vertical Dialog
items.description: A modal dialog whose title, description, and actions read as vertical columns. Focus trap, Escape, scrim dismiss, focus restore.

items.name: sheet
items.title: Vertical Sheet
items.description: An edge sheet aware of the reading axis · enter from screen geometry (bottom) or reading direction (left/right). Modal semantics included.

items.name: text-field
items.title: Vertical Text Field
items.description: A labeled input for vertical interfaces: vertical label, deliberately horizontal input (CJK IME composition needs the baseline), accessible help/error wiring.

items.name: tabs
items.title: Vertical Tabs
items.description: A tab rail on the reading axis: vertical labels at the right edge, panels to their left, full tablist keyboard semantics.
